config: # Vehicle + station both on bench-1591794 (T11 firmware).

#   - Config switch applied via USB CDC on both boards.
#   Nav rate 5->10 Hz at BW125: first-try +3.3 pp (13.3 -> 16.7%).
#     Modest improvement. Eventual rate drops (36.7 -> 30%) — possibly
#     higher nav rate compresses retry timer windows or amplifies collisions.
#     Huge. Halving airtime breaks the collision regime (T1 diagnosis confirmed).
#     Another big gain. Asymptoting toward the 95% Batch A gate.
#   Session-to-session variance is substantial. Likely candidates: RF
#   was 3000->500 ms — possibly over-aggressive for BW250 where airtime
#   is still ~70 ms so retries spam the RX window).
# Batch A gate (C2 >= 95% first-try): NOT MET (83.3%).
# Link brittleness from T7 session is NOT recurring: all 4 configs
# successfully formed a link. IVP-T11 register adds are architecturally
# correct and in tree. The gap to 95% is not a driver issue — it's
# the TX-window sync issue that Batch B (IVP-T14 RxDone-anchored TX)
#   C0 in this T12: 13.3% first-try / 36.7% eventual. Possibly T11 LnaBoostHf
